sentences.target: Ich will den Schlüssel ins Schloss stecken.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl deːn ˈʃlʏsəl ɪns ʃlɔs ˈʃtɛkn̩/

translations.de: Ich will den Schlüssel ins Schloss stecken.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl deːn ˈʃlʏsəl ɪns ʃlɔs ˈʃtɛkn̩/
translations.en: I want to put the key in the lock.
translations.es: Quiero meter la llave en la cerradura.
translations.fr: Je veux mettre la clé dans la serrure.
translations.it: Voglio infilare la chiave nella serratura.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想把钥匙插进锁孔里。
translations.ru: Я хочу вставить ключ в замок.
translations.pt: Quero colocar a chave na fechadura.
translations.he: אני רוצה להכניס את המפתח למנעול.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn tra chìa vào ổ khóa.
translations.nl: Ik wil de sleutel in het slot steken.
translations.uk: Я хочу вставити ключ у замок.
translations.hu: Be akarom dugni a kulcsot a zárba.
translations.hi: मैं चाबी को ताले में डालना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να βάλω το κλειδί στην κλειδαριά.
translations.nb: Jeg vil sette nøkkelen i låsen.
translations.id: Saya ingin memasukkan kunci ke dalam lubang kunci.
translations.sv: Jag vill sätta in nyckeln i låset.
translations.ro: Vreau să bag cheia în broască.
translations.da: Jeg vil sætte nøglen i låsen.
translations.ja: 鍵を鍵穴に差し込みたいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1sg) selecting the infinitive 'stecken'; expresses intention.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; marks the direct object 'Schlüssel'.
Common noun (masc.); direct object of 'stecken'.
Contraction of 'in + das'; preposition governing accusative here to indicate direction.
Common noun (neut.); object of the preposition 'ins' (goal of motion).
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of modal 'will'; denotes the action of inserting/putting.

sentences.target: Ich soll den Zettel in die Mappe stecken.
sentences.reading: /ɪç zɔl deːn ˈtsɛtl̩ ɪn diː ˈmapə ˈʃtɛkn̩/

translations.de: Ich soll den Zettel in die Mappe stecken.
translations.ipa: /ɪç zɔl deːn ˈtsɛtl̩ ɪn diː ˈmapə ˈʃtɛkn̩/
translations.en: I'm supposed to put the note into the folder.
translations.es: Tengo que meter el papel en la carpeta.
translations.fr: Je dois mettre le papier dans le dossier.
translations.it: Devo mettere il foglietto nella cartellina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我应该把纸条放进文件夹里。
translations.yue: 我應該把紙條放入文件夾。
translations.ru: Мне нужно положить записку в папку.
translations.pt: Tenho que colocar o papel na pasta.
translations.he: אני אמור לשים את הפתק בתיקייה.
translations.vi: Tôi phải bỏ tờ giấy vào bìa hồ sơ.
translations.ar: من المفترض أن أضع الورقة في الملف.
translations.nl: Ik moet het briefje in de map doen.
translations.uk: Мені слід покласти записку у папку.
translations.hu: Be kell tennem a cetlit a mappába.
translations.hi: मुझे पर्ची को फ़ोल्डर में रखना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να βάλω το χαρτάκι στον φάκελο.
translations.nb: Jeg skal legge lappen i mappen.
translations.id: Saya harus memasukkan catatan ke dalam map.
translations.sv: Jag ska lägga lappen i mappen.
translations.ro: Trebuie să pun bilețelul în dosar.
translations.da: Jeg skal lægge sedlen i mappen.
translations.ja: メモをフォルダに入れなきゃいけません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1sg/3sg form used for 1sg here) selecting the infinitive 'stecken'; expresses obligation.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; marks the direct object 'Zettel'.
Common noun (masc.); direct object of 'stecken'.
Preposition governing accusative here to indicate direction ('in die Mappe').
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Mappe' after 'in' (directional).
Common noun (fem.); object of the preposition 'in' (goal of motion).
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of modal 'soll'; denotes the action of inserting/putting.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们就别讨论这个话题了。
translations.yue: 我哋唔好再講呢個話題喇。
translations.pt: Vamos deixar o assunto de lado.
translations.vi: Mình bỏ qua chuyện này nhé.
translations.nl: Laten we het onderwerp laten rusten.
translations.hi: चलो इस बात को यहीं छोड़ देते हैं.
translations.ja: この話題はここまでにしよう。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary/causative verb (present, 1pl) selecting bare infinitive 'stecken'; in the idiom 'etwas stecken lassen' meaning to drop/abandon something.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; marks the object 'Thema'.
Common noun (neut.); direct object of 'lassen' in the light-verb construction.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complements 'lassen' and describes the object's state ('leave it stuck'), forming an idiomatic expression.

sentences.target: Die Karte scheint im Automaten zu stecken.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkaʁtə ʃaɪ̯nt ɪm ˌaʊ̯toˈmaːtn̩ tsuː ˈʃtɛkn̩/

translations.de: Die Karte scheint im Automaten zu stecken.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkaʁtə ʃaɪ̯nt ɪm ˌaʊ̯toˈmaːtn̩ tsuː ˈʃtɛkn̩/
translations.en: The card seems to be stuck in the machine.
translations.es: La tarjeta parece estar atascada en la máquina.
translations.fr: La carte semble coincée dans la machine.
translations.it: La carta sembra bloccata nella macchina.
translations.zh-Hans: 卡片好像卡在机器里了。
translations.yue: 張卡好似卡喺部機入面。
translations.pt: O cartão parece estar preso na máquina.
translations.vi: Có vẻ như thẻ bị kẹt trong máy.
translations.ar: يبدو أن البطاقة عالقة في الجهاز.
translations.nl: De kaart lijkt vast te zitten in de automaat.
translations.hu: Úgy tűnik, a kártya beragadt az automatában.
translations.hi: लगता है कार्ड मशीन में फँस गया है.
translations.pl: Wygląda na to, że karta utknęła w automacie.
translations.el: Η κάρτα φαίνεται να έχει κολλήσει στο μηχάνημα.
translations.nb: Det ser ut som kortet sitter fast i automaten.
translations.id: Kartu itu sepertinya tersangkut di mesin.
translations.sv: Kortet verkar ha fastnat i automaten.
translations.ro: Se pare că cardul s-a blocat în aparat.
translations.cs: Zdá se, že karta uvízla v automatu.
translations.da: Kortet ser ud til at sidde fast i automaten.
translations.ja: カードが機械に詰まってしまったみたいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; marks the subject 'Karte'.
Common noun (fem.); subject of the clause.
Lexical (raising) verb (present, 3sg) taking a 'zu'-infinitive clause; expresses apparent state.
Contraction of 'in + dem'; preposition governing dative here to indicate location.
Common noun (masc. dative singular); object of the preposition 'im' indicating location.
Infinitival particle marking the non-finite verb 'stecken'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; part of the 'zu'-infinitive clause describing the state of the card (being stuck in the machine).
